name: Wazuh
description: Imports endpoint inventory and vulnerability findings from Wazuh (https://wazuh.com), the open-source XDR/SIEM. Each Wazuh agent becomes an ASSET (name + IP + OS); syscollector packages become components/CPEs; vulnerability-detector findings become VULNERABILITIES (CVE + severity) attached to their agent. Offline mode: parse a saved Wazuh API JSON (an /agents or /vulnerability/{agent} response, shape {data:{affected_items:[...]}}, or a {agents,vulnerabilities,packages} bundle). Live mode: if `manager` (or WAZUH_API_URL) is set and WAZUH_API_USER/WAZUH_API_PASSWORD are in the worker env, authenticates (JWT) and pulls agents + per-agent vulnerabilities (needs `pip install requests`). Read-only API queries (non-intrusive). No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a saved Wazuh API JSON (/agents, /vulnerability/{agent}, or a {agents,vulnerabilities,packages} bundle) to import.

parameters.name: manager
parameters.help: Live mode: Wazuh server API base URL, e.g. https://wazuh.example:55000 (else WAZUH_API_URL in the worker env). Credentials come from WAZUH_API_USER/WAZUH_API_PASSWORD.

parameters.name: agent
parameters.help: Optional: agent name to attribute vulnerabilities to when an offline vulnerability export lacks the agent context.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Live mode: maximum number of agents to enrich with vulnerabilities/packages.
